form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 425m. Last start finished 4th in a R/A FIN on April 5 over 425m at this track behind Biscottino beaten 8 lengths (24.08). More than capable and has to be included.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.20) at Shepparton in a Mix 3/4, finishing third and beaten 1.5 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 3.5 lengths sixth (24.15) over 425m at this track. Happy to risk this time.
